$schema_doc: paprika v2 plugin catalog -- a directory of plugins known to paprika (whether or not they are currently installed). Edit this file to advertise a new plugin; operators can then 'install' it from the Plugins admin tab. Installed plugins live under data/tools/installed/{name}/; the catalog is purely the discoverability layer.

plugins.name: paprika-flare
plugins.summary: Cloudflare bypass via paprika Worker Chrome (auto-clear JS challenges, optional vision agent for Turnstile)

plugins.name: paprika-proxy-fetch
plugins.summary: Proxied httpx GET for IP-banned hosts (bypasses CF 1020 / region blocks). Complements paprika-flare.

plugins.name: paprika-ytdlp
plugins.summary: yt-dlp wrapper with live HLS auto-detection. Records the first N seconds when no #EXT-X-ENDLIST is present.
